mapper.select: SELECT access_idx, access_ip, use_yn, remark, add_date, add_id FROM ACCESS_IP ORDER BY add_date DESC
SELECT access_idx, access_ip, use_yn, remark, add_date, add_id FROM ACCESS_IP WHERE access_idx = #{access_idx}
mapper.update: UPDATE ACCESS_IP SET access_ip = #{access_ip}, use_yn = #{use_yn}, remark = #{remark}, mod_date = SYSDATE, mod_id = #{mod_id} WHERE access_idx = #{access_idx}
